summary: Built a B2B knowledge platform that connects AI assistants to fragmented company data through an MCP server. Developed provider-agnostic ingestion pipelines and incremental sync architecture to improve document retrieval.
imageAlt: Screenshot of the Ember Intelligence website.

summary: Created a fact-checking Chrome extension to verify highlighted claims using retrieval-augmented generation. Evaluated several retrieval architectures to measure latency, context leakage, and misinformation induction.
imageAlt: Screenshot for the RAG Fact-Checking Extension project.

summary: Designed a relational database to support large-scale analysis of flight routes, assignments, and crew data. Built a real-time data pipeline and compiled datasets covering 10,000+ airports, 7,000 aircraft, and 600 airlines.
imageAlt: Relational diagram for the FlightOps Database Design project.
